rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER SECOND AMENDED AND RESTATED, HAROLD E. KORF TRUST, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustees Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Kyong M. Kim
rulings.Rulings: On February 25, 2014, the Court granted Petitioner Ricardo Alvarez additional time to file an opposition brief to Frank Woo's ("Trustee") Motion to Strike Portions of the Second Amended Complaint or alternatively, move for a continuance. The pleadings were to be filed no later than March 5, 2014. Alvarez did not file an opposition brief by March 5, 2014, nor did he request a continuance. The Court grants Trustee's Motion to Strike paragraphs 6, 7, and 8 of the Second Amended Petition because these paragraphs are irrelevant to the capacity claim. (Code Civ. Proc., Section 436, subd. (a); Prob. Code Section 6100.5.) The Court denies the Request for Judicial Notice of the Death Certificate. The prevailing party must prepare an order. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative ruling must notify the Court (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on March 11, 2014.
